title: Virtualization Layer Abstraction
description: A flowchart illustrating how a hypervisor virtualizes and manages access to physical CPU, Memory, and I/O devices for multiple virtual machines.
relationships: Hypervisor abstracts Physical Hardware into virtual resources
Hypervisor schedules VM requests for CPU time onto Physical Cores
Hypervisor maps Virtual Memory addresses to Physical Memory addresses
Hypervisor translates and routes Virtual I/O requests to Physical Devices
Each VM interacts only with its own allocated virtual resources (vCPU, Virtual RAM, Virtual I/O devices)
